items.title: Google built a great smart speaker, but Gemini isn’t ready for it
items.summary: Smart speakers have spent the past few years searching for a compelling second act. Beyond music, timers, and controlling your lights, they've struggled to justify taking up space on the kitchen counter. AI promised to change that. Amazon debuted its new hardware powered by a revamped Alexa last fall, and now it's...

items.title: Hidden code in Claude Code secretly flagged Chinese users
items.summary: Anthropic is removing a hidden monitoring feature from its programming tool, Claude Code, after it sparked outrage on social media. The article Hidden code in Claude Code secretly flagged Chinese users appeared first on The Decoder .

items.title: Claude Sonnet 5 continues Anthropic's pattern of hiding price increases behind unchanged token rates
items.summary: Claude Sonnet 5 ranks fifth in the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index with 53 points and even beats the pricier Opus 4.8 on some agent-based tasks. But the model chews through about 40 percent more tokens per task than its predecessor, nearly doubling real costs despite identical list prices. Anthropic's hidden...

items.title: OpenAI paper reveals three GPT-5.6 Pro models, breaking with single top-tier strategy
items.summary: An OpenAI benchmark paper suggests that the Pro tier of GPT-5.6 could ship in three variants. That would be the first major change to ChatGPT Pro's structure since the plan launched. The article OpenAI paper reveals three GPT-5.6 Pro models, breaking with single top-tier strategy appeared first on The Decoder .

items.title: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
items.summary: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.

items.title: AI Computing Demand Is Pushing Global Power Grids to the Breaking Point
items.summary: Gartner reports 26% surge in data center electricity consumption as AI training and inference strain power infrastructure worldwide.

items.title: ByteDance's Doubao Pivots to Enterprise AI, Mirroring Zhipu AI's B2B Strategy
items.summary: ByteDance shifts Doubao's focus from consumer chat to enterprise AI coding and agent tools, following Zhipu AI's successful B2B playbook.

items.title: DeepSeek Raises $7B in Record-Breaking China AI Funding Round, Targets Domestic Computing Infrastructure
items.summary: DeepSeek completes $7 billion funding round to invest in domestic AI chips, expand hiring, and accelerate AGI development.

items.title: Anthropic's Fable 5 is back worldwide after a two-week government ban over a jailbreak
items.summary: After a two-week ban, the US government is letting Anthropic ship Fable 5 globally again. Amazon researchers had found a jailbreak, but Anthropic says even much smaller models like Claude Haiku 4.5 could pull off the same exploit. A new safety classifier blocks the technique in over 99 percent of cases, though it also...
